code: @Manual{,   title = {replicateEverything: Tools to Replicate Empirical Research Papers},   author = {Macartan Humphreys and Vermon Washington},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.1.0},   url = {https://github.com/replicate-anything/replicateEverything}, }

title: replicateEverything
text: package reproducing academic research results programmatically simply. package allows users reproduce figures tables academic papers using standardized way structuring replication repository special way adding registry. goal make research transparent, modular, easily reproducible.

title: replicateEverything
text: replicateEverything provides simple interface : search replication-ready papers retrieve replication repositories reproduce figures tables run full paper replications system built around registry architecture replication repositories indexed accessed dynamically, making easier academics papers replicated one line code.

title: replicateEverything
text: inspiration create package came idea Macartan Humphreys, Director Institutions Political Inequality Research Group WZB talk gave Lab2Lab^2 audience 2024. project active development moment. feedback welcome. Feel free email Macartan.

title: replicateEverything
text: Every replication repository MUST follows standardized structure. data must store processed folder. code must stored code folder.

title: replicateEverything
text: Ideally, make sure include table dependencies.
code: paper:   title: Market Design and Moral Behavior   authors:     - Bartling, Björn     - Fehr, Ernst   year: 2024   doi: 10.1257/aer.20221688   journal: American Economic Review  replications:    - id: fig_1     type: figure     description: Example figure     data: processed/fig_1.csv     code: code/fig_1.R    - id: tab_1     type: table     description: Example table     data: processed/tab_1.csv     code: code/tab_1.R     dependencies:       - dplyr       - gt

what: replicateEverything: Reproduce Empirical Research Results — replicateEverything-package
title: replicateEverything: Reproduce Empirical Research Results — replicateEverything-package
text: replicateEverything package provides tools discovering executing computational replications empirical research papers. connects public replication registry containing metadata, replication scripts, processed datasets required reproduce figures tables published studies.

title: replicateEverything: Reproduce Empirical Research Results — replicateEverything-package
text: typical workflow using package : Retrieve metadata paper using get_doi_metadata(). Search replication registry using search_papers(). Create template contributing replication using create_replication_template(). Inspect available replications using list_replications(). Run single replication using run_replication(). Reproduce results paper using replicate_paper().

title: replicateEverything: Reproduce Empirical Research Results — replicateEverything-package
text: Retrieve metadata paper: get_doi_metadata("10.1177/00491241211036161") Search registry: search_papers("causal") Create replication template: create_replication_template("10.1177/00491241211036161") List replications: list_replications("10.1177/00491241211036161") Run single replication: run_replication("10.1177/00491241211036161","fig_1") Replicate entire paper: replicate_paper("10.1177/00491241211036161")

title: replicateEverything: Reproduce Empirical Research Results — replicateEverything-package
text: Replication metadata materials stored public registry: https://github.com/replicate-anything/registry.
